TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View'
UNION ALL
select SCENARIO, concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD, LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Statutory_View'
UNION ALL
select SCENARIO, PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL, sum(AMOUNT) as AMOUNT FROM((select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View') UNION ALL (select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs )) group by SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL
UNION ALL
select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View'
UNION ALL
select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Statutory_View'
UNION ALL
select SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL, sum(AMOUNT) as AMOUNT FROM((select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View') UNION ALL (select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT FROM wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs )) group by SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
select * from WC_PBCS_ACTUALS_PS where PERIOD in ( select distinct PERIOD FROM( select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs ) )
UNION ALL
select * from WC_PBCS_PLAN_PS where PERIOD in ( select distinct PERIOD FROM( select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs UNION select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs ) )

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Post SQL
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: These workflows are created from the Workflow Generation Wizard.
WORKFLOW.NAME: JEG_SDE_ORA_WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
